description_long: This is a standard traffic cone with a conical body and a wide, square base, commonly used for road safety and traffic control in urban environments. The cone is predominantly orange with two broad, horizontal white reflective stripes encircling its upper and middle sections. The surface of the cone shows visible signs of wear, including dirt, scuff marks, and some fading, suggesting it has been used outdoors. The base is thick, flat, and also orange, with a slightly rough texture and some grime, providing stability and weight to prevent tipping. The tip of the cone is rounded and solid, with no attachments or openings. No logos, text, or additional markings are visible on any side of the cone.
description: A worn orange traffic cone with two wide white reflective stripes and a thick, square base, showing visible dirt and scuff marks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cone's orange body, two white reflective stripes, and a square, dirty base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the same features, with more visible grime and wear on the lower stripe and base.
description_view_2: Another side view with similar wear patterns, showing the cone's slightly faded surface and scuffed base.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the rounded tip, both reflective stripes, and the heavily worn base.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two wide, horizontal white reflective stripes encircle the upper and middle sections of the cone.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded, solid, and orange, with no attachments or openings.
attribute_base_design: The base is square, thick, and flat, made of orange material with a rough, dirty texture for stability.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos or markings are visible.
attribute_condition: Worn and dirty, with visible scuff marks, fading, and grime.
